The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Continued To Dec-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Continued To Nov-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Costello appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mrs. Costello informed the court that she was involved in a serious automobile accident that will require surgery, stated that she is having a very difficult time and asked for a continuance. When asked about the assets, Mrs. Costello stated that all of the items were stolen from the estate by a third party and taken to Nevada, that a false claim was filed with the insurance company, and that the items were worth more than $150,000.00. Mrs. Costello also stated that the items were very expensive audio, visual and photography equipment, that her son did documentary films and had a music business, and that she has spoken with a couple of people and it is her intention to have an attorney. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to November 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mrs. Costello that nothing will happen in this case until she takes steps.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Jul-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Costello, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

At the court's query, Ms. Costello offers a status of the estate and of her efforts with this matter and she advises that she is seeking the assistance of an attorney. The court and Ms. Costello discuss the bond issue and she advises that the value of the estate has yet to be determined and therefore bond cannot be secured. The court confirms that Ms. Costello resides in California and acknowledges her position. The court reviews the list of pending issues as described in the Examiner's notes and suggests that she consider contacting the SF Bar Association for an attorney referral.

The matter is continued to Jun-26-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods/Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
